source_attribution: Hatcher Algebraic Topology (2002) Ch. 2 ISBN 978-0-521-79540-1 for cochains; Bossavit Computational Electromagnetism (1998) ISBN 978-0-12-118710-1 for discrete Hodge/constitutive structure; Maxwell A Dynamical Theory of the Electromagnetic Field (1865) Phil. Trans. R. Soc. 155:459-512 for the classical Maxwell target.
bounded_derivation_statement: QA derives Maxwell only within the stated carrier, boundary, source, metric, unit, and observer-projection conventions certified here.

certified_conventions.carrier: finite exact QA cochain carriers from [509] and [512]
certified_conventions.boundary: declared oriented finite cell boundaries with signed coboundary
certified_conventions.source: exact QA source cochain J from [511]/[512], not physical source generation
certified_conventions.unit: declared exact rational unit scale inherited from [512]
